notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly visible/ambiguous events (traveling in inheritance secret realm, dodging inheritance meteors, Ye Li Sang fighting golden-horned leopards, Ju Yang will being expelled from the building). No clearly private knowledge, future-known information, or secret motives/plans are directly supported by the source pointers. The events described are either publicly observable actions or ambiguous in nature. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted with sufficient source backing.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly action descriptions (方源驱逐巨阳意志, 太白云生防御受损, 耶律桑烧金角豹群) but no clear observed motive that can be directly tied to a character's internal drive with one-step inference. Most events describe what happened, not why characters acted. For example, 方源发动王牌手段驱逐巨阳意志 - the observed action is clear but the seed does not provide direct context for a cautious one-step inferred motive beyond speculation. 太白云生提议撤退 - could be inferred as self-preservation but the seed lacks direct support for this as a motive. 耶律桑焚烧金角豹群 - could be survival but again insufficient direct context. Returning empty as per rules.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily focuses on individual actors (方源, 太白云生, 耶律桑, 巨阳意志) and their personal conflicts/actions. No named collective faction, clan, family, or organization appears as a stakeholder with group-level pressure. 巨阳意志 is a will/consciousness, not a collective group. 金角豹群 (golden-horned leopard pack) appears as a beast group in conflict with 耶律桑 but is not a named faction/clan/family with organized collective stakes. No named family, clan, or faction from the seed has a concrete stake that would generate faction-level pressure.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
